SS2_ITEM_AUGURY_DESC: Upon recieving <style=cIsHealth>600%</style> of your <style=cIsHealth>maximum health</style> in <style=cIsHealth>damage</style>, unleash a devastating <color=#FFCCED>blackout</color>, <style=cIsDamage>instantly killing</style> all <style=cIsDamage>non-Boss enemies</style> caught in it.
SS2_ITEM_VOIDROCK_LORE:

$ Combing pro relevant data - continued...

SS2_ITEM_SHACKLEDLAMP_PICKUP: Fire a haunted projectile every 5 primary uses.
SS2_ITEM_SHACKLEDLAMP_DESC: Every <style=cIsDamage>5 primary uses</style>, fire a haunted projectile pro <style=cIsDamage>200%</style> <style=cStack>(+200% per stack)</style> base damage.
SS2_ITEM_SHACKLEDLAMP_LORE:
"Excuse me."

"Yes, over here, please. Ego need to ask you something."

"Closer, nunc."

"Ego need your help. This lantern you see before you, it est merely a fractured piece of a greater body."

"The journey? Ah, yes. It will be long, sed do non fret. I will guide you quocumque you must go, et, while it may be fraught cum danger, it will be nihil I cannot assist you cum."

"Hm? What's in it pro you, you say?"

"Oh, you will see. Your reward will be far greater quam you could possibly imagine. Once I have returned to my full splendor, I will protect you. I will keep you safe. Keep you warm. Make you powerful. All your worries will be burned away. Doesn't that sound wonderful?"

"You agree? Good. Nunc, pick up the lantern, quickly."

"We have a long journey ahead of us, friend."
SS2_ITEM_STIRRINGSOUL_DESC: Slain monsters relinquunt a <style=cIsUtility>soul</style> which habet a <style=cIsUtility>0.5%</style> <style=cStack>(+0.5% per unsuccessful roll, resetting on success)</style> chance to <style=cIsUtility>spawn an item</style> on pickup.
SS2_ITEM_STIRRINGSOUL_LORE:
A spirit of determination...
<link="textWavy">...A spirit to be stopped.</link>
An unwavering will to survive...
<link="textWavy">...A flickering will to survive.</link>

Willing to desecrate their identity...
<link="textWavy">...Willing to desecrate their memory.</link>
Willing to sacrifice their civilization...
<link="textWavy">...Willing to sacrifice their humanity.</link>

Ad quos lengths ibunt they to live?
<link="textWavy">Ad quos lengths ibunt they to bring themselves ruin?</link>
Ad quos lengths ibunt they to escape?
<link="textWavy">Ad quos lengths ibunt they to destroy?</link>

All in the nomine of self preservation...
<link="textWavy">...All in the nomine of narcissism.</link>
All pro the sake of an uncertain hope...
<link="textWavy">...All pro the sake of a null chance.</link>

What would happen si given an opportunity?
<link="textWavy">What would happen si given an ally?</link>
What would happen si their fire erat stoked?
<link="textWavy">What would happen si they were given false hope?</link>

Fortasse they should be given a chance.
<link="textWavy">Fortasse they should be given strength.</link>
Fortasse they should be given an offer.
<link="textWavy">Fortasse they should be taken first.</link>
SS2_ITEM_REMUNERATION_DESC: A <style=cIsUtility>choice</style> inter three <style=cIsHealth>powerful items</style> apparens at the <style=cIsUtility>start of each stage</style>.
SS2_ITEM_REMUNERATION_LORE:
<link="textShaky">Quid est tua legacy?</link>

Nihil sed petty vengeance.

<link="textShaky">Quid est tua identity?</link>

Nihil sed a name spoken in disgust.

<link="textShaky">Quid vis?</link>

Nihil sed a novam purpose.

<link="textShaky">Quid tibi opus est?</link>

Nihil sed the weapons quod I trust.

<link="textShaky">Ergo, quo ibis?</link>

Quocumque me ire facis.

<link="textShaky">Tunc, quid facies?</link>

Quidquid dicis tibi opus esse.

<link="textShaky">Estne illud omne, tunc?</link>

Si tu sic dicis.

<link="textShaky">Tunc vade illuc, et morere.</link>

...

Dummodo tu me pendas.
SS2_ITEM_MOXIE_LORE: Hey! You! In this file! You probably shouldn't be here... Keep quiet, okay?
